evals.prompt: Can you audit and optimize the SEO on my VOID Digital Studio homepage? The file is at /Users/arianvp/Downloads/void-digital-studio/index.html — fix everything and give me a report.
evals.expected_output: Optimized index.html with full SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter card, canonical, robots, JSON-LD structured data, and a written audit report listing what was fixed and scored.

evals.prompt:
I just built a landing page for a coffee shop called Morning Knead and I need you to optimize it for SEO. Here's the HTML: Morning Knead

Welcome to Morning Knead

Fresh bread every morning

We bake fresh sourdough, croissants, and pastries daily in Portland, Oregon. Visit us at 123 Main St.

Our Menu

Sourdough loaf - $8. Croissant - $4. Pain au chocolat - $5.

Hours

Mon-Fri 6am-2pm, Sat-Sun 7am-3pm

Make it rank on Google.
evals.expected_output: Optimized HTML with proper title (50-60 chars), meta description (150-160 chars), OG tags, Twitter card, canonical, robots, LocalBusiness JSON-LD structured data with address/hours, fixed heading hierarchy (h1 then h2s not h3s), image alt text added, and a full audit report.

evals.prompt: Hey can you check the SEO on my about page and fix it up? It's at /Users/arianvp/Downloads/void-digital-studio/about.html
evals.expected_output: Optimized about.html with improved/verified title tag, meta description, OG tags, Twitter card, canonical URL, robots meta, AboutPage JSON-LD schema, heading audit, and a written report showing before/after for each item.
